executives.name: Andre Lauzon
executives.background: Mr. Lauzon was appointed Chief Operating Officer in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2012 and has held various operational leadership roles, including Vice President of the Manitoba Business Unit and Vice President, Business Development and Technical Services.

executives.name: Bill Washington
executives.background: Mr. Washington has over 30 years of experience in investment banking and the mining sector.
